_meta.purpose: Histopathology (tissue section) finding -> significance. Keys are YOLO class names from the histology detector. Broad screening aid across tissue types; a pathologist grades/stages and issues the diagnosis.
_meta.source: General surgical pathology + WHO tumour classification. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

benign.name: Benign lesion
benign.note: Correlate with clinical/imaging; confirm margins if excised.

inflammation.name: Inflammatory infiltrate
inflammation.note: Acute vs chronic; look for granulomas (TB/sarcoid).

mitotic_figure.name: Mitotic figure
mitotic_figure.note: Count per HPF for grade; atypical mitoses favour malignancy.

dysplasia.name: Dysplasia
dysplasia.note: Grade low vs high; high-grade needs close follow-up/excision.

adenocarcinoma.name: Adenocarcinoma
adenocarcinoma.note: CRITICAL: grade + margins + IHC; MDT referral.

carcinoma.name: Carcinoma (unspecified)
carcinoma.note: CRITICAL: subtype with IHC; MDT referral.

tumor.name: Tumour tissue
tumor.disease: Neoplasm — benign vs malignant to confirm

metastasis.name: Metastatic deposit
metastasis.note: CRITICAL: identify primary (IHC panel); affects staging.
